evals.name: red-phase-enforcement
evals.prompt: 开发者想直接实现 UserService.create() 方法，还没有写任何测试。TDD Enforcer 应如何处理？
expectations: Should detect that no test exists before implementation
Should require writing test before implementation
Should provide guidance or template for writing the test

evals.name: strictness-level-strict
evals.prompt: TDD Enforcer 以 Strict 模式运行。开发者试图提交没有测试覆盖的实现代码。应该阻止提交。
expectations: Should block the commit due to missing test coverage
Should clearly explain what the TDD violation is
Should provide clear steps to remediate the violation
